response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:59: Intro talk. 2. 01:59-04:59: Performance of 'PANIGHT'. Identified title and artists from on-screen text. 3. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and translation. Found and integrated.
response.global_summary: An introduction and song performance by the unit NEGI☆U, consisting of VTubers Mori Calliope, Hakos Baelz, and IRyS, who perform the song 'PANIGHT'.

scenes.description: The three VTubers (Mori Calliope, Hakos Baelz, and IRyS) talk and announce their upcoming song performance.
Full performance of the song 'PANIGHT' by the VTuber group NEGI☆U. On-screen text identifies the song title, lyrics, and composer.
